game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Mindustry** Mindustry is a factory-building, tower defense, and RTS hybrid where players construct elaborate supply chains to extract resources and defend a core. Players tap to place production blocks like drills and factories, drag to connect them with conveyor belts, and manage resource flow to refine raw materials into advanced components. These components feed turrets for defending against periodic enemy waves (e.g., every 45 seconds, increasing in strength by 10% per wave) and unit factories that produce over 50 types of drones and mechs, commanded by tapping and dragging to target enemy bases. Progression involves conquering 35 hand-made maps and 250+ procedurally generated sectors across two planets, unlocking over 250 technology blocks via a research tree that requires specific material investments. The game ends if the player's core is destroyed by enemy forces, or upon successfully destroying all enemy structures and capturing a sector.
game_info.description: Build your factory, defend your core! Extract resources with drills, transport them via conveyors, and refine materials in factories. Use resources to build defensive turrets and units. Enemy waves attack every 45 seconds with increasing strength. Survive 10 waves to win, or lose if your core is destroyed. Plan your factory layout carefully to maximize production and defense!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move camera view
Space: Place selected building at cursor position
Z: Delete building at cursor position
Shift: Cycle through available buildings (Drill → Conveyor → Factory → Turret → Unit Factory)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and building placement test. Validates that the player can move the camera, select different building types, and place buildings in valid locations. Tests core game mechanics functionality.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move camera in all directions, cycle through all building types, attempt to place buildings in various locations, and verify building placement rules work correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate the map, cycle through buildings, place at least one of each building type, and verify game state updates correctly. Test passes if buildings are placed without errors.

TEST_1.expected: Successfully navigate the map, cycle through buildings, place at least one of each building type, and verify game state updates correctly. Test passes if buildings are placed without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Winning strategy test. Implements an optimal factory layout to generate resources, build defenses, and survive all 10 enemy waves. Tests complete game loop and win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Build drills near resource deposits first, connect with conveyors to factories for material processing. Place turrets strategically around the core. Build unit factories and deploy units. Optimize resource flow to maximize defense capabilities.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully build a functioning factory with resource extraction, processing, and defense systems. Survive all 10 enemy waves and achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test validates complete gameplay loop and win condition.

TEST_3.test_description: Resource flow and production chain test. Validates that resources are correctly extracted, transported via conveyors, and processed in factories. Tests the supply chain mechanics.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Place drills on resource nodes, create conveyor networks connecting drills to factories, and monitor resource accumulation in gameState. Verify materials are produced and stored correctly.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Resources flow from drills through conveyors to factories. Materials are processed and accumulated. Test passes when factory produces advanced materials and resource counts increase as expected.
TEST_3.description: Resource flow and production chain test. Validates that resources are correctly extracted, transported via conveyors, and processed in factories. Tests the supply chain mechanics.

TEST_3.expected: Resources flow from drills through conveyors to factories. Materials are processed and accumulated. Test passes when factory produces advanced materials and resource counts increase as expected.

TEST_4.test_description: Defense system test. Validates turret targeting, firing mechanics, and enemy destruction. Tests combat mechanics and defensive capabilities.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Build turrets near the core, wait for enemy waves, observe turret targeting and firing. Verify enemies take damage and are destroyed. Monitor core health to ensure defenses are effective.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Turrets automatically target and fire at enemies. Enemies are destroyed before reaching the core. Core health remains stable. Test passes when multiple waves are successfully defended.
